interpretation: Stock OF13 externalTemperature combines emissivity with sigma into an effective heat-transfer coefficient and only exports separate radiation when a qr field is configured; this is an analogy, not the custom source.
All admitted Salt 2/3/4 rcExternalTemperature patches carry emissivity and Tsur metadata in the AGENT-263 table.
